calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Herman Jeronimo Borjas was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Nina Aaliyah Lopez.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-02-2008 Reset To Sep-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Bruce E. Chan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Herman Jeronimo Borjas was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file, but petitioner needs to complete some additional paperwork prior to the Court entering a Change of Name.

Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name is continued to September 23, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
